title: Understand: natural selection
description: Check your understanding of natural selection in this set of free, standards-aligned practice questions.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is an example of an advantageous trait?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a trait that helps an organism camouflage from predators
a trait that decreases an organism’s chance of mating
a trait that makes it harder for an organism to compete for resources

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is an example of a disadvantageous trait?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a trait that decreases an organism’s ability to get food
a trait that increases an organism’s chance of mating
a trait that helps an organism defend itself from predators

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is an example of an advantageous trait?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a trait that increases an organism’s chance of mating
a trait that makes it harder for an organism to defend itself from predators
a trait that decreases an organism’s ability to get food

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**  

>Traits that help organisms survive and reproduce will likely become \_\_\_\_\_\_ in a population. 

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: more common
less common

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**  

>Traits that make it harder for organisms to survive and reproduce will likely become \_\_\_\_\_\_ in a population.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: less common
more common

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**  

>Traits that make it \_\_\_\_\_\_ for organisms to survive and reproduce will likely become less common in a population.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: harder
easier

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**  

>Individuals with advantageous traits will likely have \_\_\_\_\_\_ compared to individuals with disadvantageous traits.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: more offspring
fewer offspring

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**  

>Individuals with disadvantageous traits will likely have \_\_\_\_\_\_ compared to individuals with advantageous traits.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: fewer offspring
more offspring

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which individuals in a population are likely to have more offspring?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: individuals with advantageous traits
individuals with disadvantageous traits

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about natural selection is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Natural selection happens because organisms in a population have variations in their inherited traits.
Natural selection occurs within an individual’s lifetime.
Natural selection can change traits in a population, but has no effect on genes.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about natural selection is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Natural selection occurs over multiple generations.
Natural selection happens because organisms in a population have identical traits.
Natural selection can change traits in a population, but has no effect on genes.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about natural selection is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Natural selection affects both genes and traits in a population.
Natural selection occurs within an individual’s lifetime.
Natural selection happens because organisms in a population have identical traits.
